style: :root{--bg-start:#f0f4f8;--bg-end:#d9e2ec;--card-bg:#fff;--card-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.08);--card-hover-shadow:0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,.1);--text-primary:#24292f;--text-secondary:#57606a;--accent:#0969da;--accent-hover:#0550b3;--border-color:#d0d7de;--divider-color:#e8ecf0;--header-border:#0969da;--tag-bg:#f3f4f6;--input-bg:#fff;--code-bg:#f6f8fa;--transition-speed:.25s}[data-color-mode=dark]{--bg-start:#0d1117;--bg-end:#161b22;--card-bg:#1c2128;--card-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.3);--card-hover-shadow:0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,.4);--text-primary:#e6edf3;--text-secondary:#8b949e;--border-color:#30363d;--divider-color:#21262d;--tag-bg:#30363d;--input-bg:#0d1117;--code-bg:#161b22}*{box-sizing:border-box}body{min-width:200px;max-width:960px;margin:0 auto;padding:32px 24px 48px;font-size:16px;font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI','Noto Sans SC',Roboto,'Helvetica Neue',Arial,sans-serif;line-height:1.7;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--bg-start) 0%,var(--bg-end) 100%);background-attachment:fixed;color:var(--text-primary);scroll-behavior:smooth;transition:background-color var(--transition-speed),color var(--transition-speed);min-height:100vh}#header{display:flex;align-items:center;padding:20px 28px;margin-bottom:28px;background:var(--card-bg);border-radius:16px;box-shadow:var(--card-shadow);border-top:3px solid var(--header-border);transition:background-color var(--transition-speed),box-shadow var(--transition-speed)}.btn-invisible{border:none;background:transparent;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text-secondary);transition:all var(--transition-speed)}.btn-invisible:hover{background:var(--tag-bg);color:var(--accent)}#backToTop{position:fixed;bottom:32px;right:32px;width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-size:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(9,105,218,.35);opacity:0;visibility:hidden;transform:translateY(12px);transition:all var(--transition-speed);z-index:1000}#backToTop.show{opacity:1;visibility:visible;transform:translateY(0)}#backToTop:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(9,105,218,.45)}.SideNav{background:transparent;border:none!important;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}.SideNav-item{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:18px 24px;background:var(--card-bg);border-radius:12px;box-shadow:var(--card-shadow);text-decoration:none;color:var(--text-primary);border:1px solid transparent;transition:all var(--transition-speed);gap:16px}.SideNav-item:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:var(--card-hover-shadow);border-color:var(--accent);text-decoration:none;color:var(--text-primary)}.listTitle{font-size:16px;font-weight:600;overflow:hidden;white-space:nowrap;text-overflow:ellipsis;max-width:100%}.listLabels{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-shrink:0;white-space:nowrap}.listLabels .Label{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;padding:3px 10px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;border-radius:20px;color:#fff;transition:transform var(--transition-speed)}.listLabels .Label:hover{transform:scale(1.05)}#footer{margin-top:64px;text-align:center;font-size:14px;color:var(--text-secondary);padding:24px 0 8px;border-top:1px solid var(--divider-color)}#footer a{color:var(--accent);text-decoration:none;font-weight:500}#footer a:hover{color:var(--accent-hover);text-decoration:underline}::-webkit-scrollbar{width:8px}::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:transparent}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:#c1c1c1;border-radius:4px}[data-color-mode=dark] ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:#484f58}@media(max-width:600px){body{padding:12px 10px 32px}#header{padding:14px 16px;border-radius:12px}.SideNav{gap:8px}.SideNav-item{padding:14px 16px;border-radius:10px;flex-wrap:wrap}#backToTop{bottom:20px;right:20px;width:40px;height:40px}}
indexStyle: .avatar{width:56px;height:56px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--card-bg),0 0 0 5px var(--accent);transition:transform .5s ease}.avatar:hover{transform:scale(1.1) rotate(360deg);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--card-bg),0 0 0 5px var(--accent),0 0 20px rgba(9,105,218,.3)}.title-left a{font-size:28px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-.5px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0969da 0%,#0550b3 50%,#0366d6 100%);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text}.title-right .btn{width:38px;height:38px;padding:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border-radius:10px}#content>div:first-child{background:var(--card-bg);padding:14px 24px;border-radius:12px;margin-bottom:20px;font-size:15px;color:var(--text-secondary);box-shadow:var(--card-shadow)}
title: qiuyuehuili's Blog
subTitle: 记录自己技术增长过程的博客~
